description: Declarative spec for the 9-section Notion closeout page tree. The script create-notion-closeout.sh reads this for high-level structure and renders the actual block content programmatically (templates can't easily express deeply-nested Notion blocks in pure JSON, so the script is the source of truth for block-level content). This file remains the documentation contract for what sections exist and in what order.

sections.title: 1. What Is a Zero-Human Company?
sections.summary: Positive framing — what it IS and is NOT. Owner-led, AI-executed.
blocks: paragraph: definition (freed from execution, not 'no humans involved')
paragraph: what it is NOT (not a chatbot, not headless)

sections.title: 2. What Is a Zero-Human Workforce?
sections.summary: People-equivalent framing. Departments as teams, agents as employees.
blocks: paragraph: team analogy (never sleep, never quit, trained on your voice)
paragraph: hierarchy summary (Owner → CEO Agent → Dept Heads → AI Employees)
paragraph: why this matters for delegation

sections.title: 3. Your Workforce Structure
blocks: paragraph: how to read the chart

sections.title: 4. How Your Workforce Runs
sections.summary: Embed infographic #2 + walk through the flow.
blocks: paragraph: why you usually only talk to the CEO

sections.title: 5. Departments & Roles
sections.summary: Section index + one sub-page per department.

sections.title: 6. Communication Hierarchy
sections.summary: Owner → CEO → Dept Heads → AI Employees + when to talk to each tier.
blocks: paragraph: why you talk to the CEO by default
paragraph: when to talk to a Department Head directly
paragraph: when NOT to talk to AI Employees directly

sections.title: 7. Six Sigma in Your ZHC
sections.summary: DMAIC framework + how it applies to the client's specific depts.

sections.title: 8. Book-to-Persona System
sections.summary: How book-to-persona governs every task + the decision matrix scoring criteria.
blocks: paragraph: what the persona system is
paragraph: 5 scoring dimensions (Relevance, Authority, Recency, Depth, Fit)
paragraph: see Skill 22 for the full framework

sections.title: 9. Your First 7 Days
blocks: bullets: open Command Center, chat with CEO
bullets: pick one small task, give it to CEO, observe
heading: Day 4 — Test a different department
heading: Day 5 — Delegate a recurring task
